title: Involuntary proceedings for dissolution; grounds; institution; appointment of liquidator
doc_html:
§143.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1970, No. 50, §13, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M.; Acts 1976, No. 587, §1, eff. Aug. 4, 1976; Acts 1982, No. 871, §1; Acts 1984, No. 406, §1; Acts 1985, No. 269, §1, eff. July 6, 1985; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
